title: Site Settings Fields

fields.label: Hero Section
fields.instructions: The top section of the homepage. Changes here appear on 180lifechurch.org within 1 hour (or instantly when the webhook fires).

fields.label: Hero Tagline
fields.name: hero_tagline
fields.instructions: Short phrase shown above the main heading. Keep it to 4-6 words. Example: 'No Perfect People Allowed'

fields.label: Hero Heading Prefix
fields.name: hero_heading_prefix
fields.instructions: The non-changing first half of the rotating headline. The rotating words below complete the sentence. Example: 'Jesus Changes' + 'Everything' = 'Jesus Changes Everything'

fields.label: Hero Rotating Words
fields.name: hero_rotating_words
fields.instructions: One word or short phrase per row. These cycle one at a time after the Heading Prefix. Click 'Add Word' to add more. Order matters — words appear in the order listed. Keep each entry to 1-3 words max.

sub_fields.label: Word
sub_fields.name: word
sub_fields.instructions: A single rotating word or short phrase (e.g., 'Everything', 'Your Family').

fields.label: Hero Description
fields.name: hero_description
fields.instructions: One or two sentences under the rotating heading. Keep it welcoming and concise. Appears on the homepage only.

fields.label: Hero Background Image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Full-width background image for the hero section. Recommended size: 1920x1080 or larger. Keep files under 500KB (Next.js will optimize further). Darker images or images with less central detail work best, since text and buttons overlay this image.

fields.label: Primary CTA Button Text
fields.name: hero_cta_primary_text
fields.instructions: Text shown on the main homepage button (the solid gold button). Keep it short — 2-4 words.

fields.label: Primary CTA Button Link
fields.name: hero_cta_primary_link
fields.instructions: Where the primary button goes. Internal paths start with a slash (e.g., '/new'). External links must start with 'https://'.

fields.label: Secondary CTA Button Text
fields.name: hero_cta_secondary_text
fields.instructions: Text shown on the secondary (outline) button. Keep it short.

fields.label: Secondary CTA Button Link
fields.name: hero_cta_secondary_link
fields.instructions: Where the secondary button goes. Internal paths start with a slash. External links must start with 'https://'.

fields.label: About Section
fields.instructions: The 'A Place Where You Belong' section on the homepage.

fields.label: About Label
fields.name: about_label
fields.instructions: Small gold label above the heading (all caps). Example: 'Gather, Grow & Go'

fields.label: About Heading
fields.name: about_heading
fields.instructions: The main (white) part of the heading. Example: 'A Place Where'

fields.label: About Heading Accent
fields.name: about_heading_accent
fields.instructions: The gold-highlighted part of the heading. Example: 'You Belong'

fields.label: About Body
fields.name: about_body
fields.instructions: Two to three paragraphs describing the church. Use the Enter key to separate paragraphs. Keep formatting simple — bold and italic work well; avoid custom colors or fonts. Images here won't display on the site (use the About Image field below).

fields.label: About Image
fields.name: about_image
fields.instructions: Photo shown next to the about text. Portrait or landscape both work. Recommended size: 1200x900 or larger. Candid community shots work best — avoid posed group photos if possible.

fields.label: About Link Text
fields.name: about_link_text
fields.instructions: Text for the 'Learn More' link under the about body.

fields.label: About Link URL
fields.name: about_link_url
fields.instructions: Where the 'Learn More' link goes. Usually '/about'.

fields.label: Contact Info
fields.instructions: Church address, phone, email, and service times. Shown in the footer of every page and on the Contact page.

fields.label: Address Line 1
fields.name: contact_address_line1
fields.instructions: Street address (e.g., '180 Still Road').

fields.label: Address Line 2
fields.name: contact_address_line2
fields.instructions: City, state, and zip (e.g., 'Bloomfield, CT 06002').

fields.label: Phone
fields.name: contact_phone
fields.instructions: Church phone number. Format as editors prefer (e.g., '(860) 243-3576'). Will be clickable on mobile.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: contact_email
fields.instructions: Main church email address. Shown in the footer and on the Contact page. Must be a valid email (no nicknames or labels).

fields.label: Service Times Summary
fields.name: contact_service_times_summary
fields.instructions: One-line summary of Sunday service times. Example: 'Sundays at 9:00 & 11:00 AM'. Shown in the footer and meta descriptions.

fields.label: Doors Open Text
fields.name: doors_open_text
fields.instructions: When doors open for visitors. Example: 'Doors open at 8:40 AM'. Shown on the /new (I'm New) page.

fields.label: Social Links
fields.instructions: WARNING: All social URLs MUST start with 'https://'. Shown in the footer of every page.

fields.label: Facebook URL
fields.name: social_facebook
fields.instructions: Full Facebook page URL. Must start with 'https://'. Leave blank to hide the Facebook icon.

fields.label: Instagram URL
fields.name: social_instagram
fields.instructions: Full Instagram profile URL. Must start with 'https://'. Leave blank to hide the Instagram icon.

fields.label: YouTube URL
fields.name: social_youtube
fields.instructions: Full YouTube channel URL. Must start with 'https://'. Leave blank to hide the YouTube icon.

fields.label: Vimeo URL
fields.name: social_vimeo
fields.instructions: Full Vimeo URL (optional). Must start with 'https://'. Leave blank to hide the Vimeo icon.

fields.label: Homepage CTA
fields.instructions: The bottom call-to-action on the homepage (the 'Your Story Starts Here' section).

fields.label: CTA Label
fields.name: cta_label
fields.instructions: Small gold label above the CTA heading.

fields.label: CTA Heading
fields.name: cta_heading
fields.instructions: First (white) part of the CTA heading.

fields.label: CTA Heading Accent
fields.name: cta_heading_accent
fields.instructions: Gold-highlighted part of the CTA heading.

fields.label: CTA Body
fields.name: cta_body
fields.instructions: Short paragraph (1-2 sentences) encouraging visitors to take the next step.
fields.default_value: It doesn't matter where you've been or what your story looks like. There's a seat saved for you. Come as you are.

fields.label: CTA Primary Button Text
fields.name: cta_primary_text
fields.instructions: Text on the main CTA button.

fields.label: CTA Primary Button Link
fields.name: cta_primary_link
fields.instructions: Where the primary button goes. Usually '/new'.

fields.label: CTA Secondary Button Text
fields.name: cta_secondary_text
fields.instructions: Text on the secondary CTA button.

fields.label: CTA Secondary Button Link
fields.name: cta_secondary_link
fields.instructions: Where the secondary button goes. Usually '/contact'.

fields.label: SEO
fields.instructions: Site-wide SEO defaults. Individual pages and posts can override these via the All in One SEO settings on each post.

fields.label: Title Template
fields.name: seo_title_template
fields.instructions: Pattern for page titles. Use %s as a placeholder for the page-specific title. Example: '%s | 180 Life Church' becomes 'Sermons | 180 Life Church'. The homepage uses the Default Title below instead of this pattern.

fields.label: Default Title (Homepage)
fields.name: seo_default_title
fields.instructions: Title shown for the homepage and used as a fallback for any page that does not have its own title set.

fields.label: Default Description
fields.name: seo_default_description
fields.instructions: Used in meta description and Open Graph tags when a page does not have its own description. Aim for 140-160 characters. Avoid keyword stuffing — write for humans, not search engines.
fields.default_value: A warm, welcoming community in Bloomfield, Connecticut. Join us for worship, connection, and life-changing experiences. Everyone is welcome.

fields.label: Default Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_default_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image shown when the site is shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, Slack, iMessage, etc. If left blank, a dynamic image is generated from /api/og (which uses the church logo and tagline).

fields.label: Twitter / X Handle
fields.name: seo_twitter_handle
fields.instructions: Include the @ symbol. Used in Twitter Card meta tags. Leave blank if the church does not use Twitter/X.

fields.label: Default Keywords
fields.name: seo_keywords
fields.instructions: Comma-separated keywords for the site. Less impactful for search rankings than they used to be, but harmless to include. Example: 'church, Bloomfield, CT, non-denominational, worship'.
fields.default_value: church, Bloomfield, CT, Connecticut, worship, community, non-denominational

fields.label: Church Identity
fields.instructions: Mission and tagline shown in the site footer on every page.

fields.label: Mission Statement
fields.name: mission_statement
fields.instructions: One sentence describing the church's mission. Shown in the footer of every page.
fields.default_value: We exist to make and send disciples who love and live like Jesus.

fields.label: Church Tagline
fields.name: church_tagline
fields.instructions: Short tagline (2-4 words) shown under the mission in the footer.

fields.label: Ministries Hub
fields.instructions: Section structure for the /ministries page. Each group becomes one section on the page with a featured ministry card plus a list of related ministries. Drag groups to reorder.

fields.label: Hub Groups
fields.name: ministries_hub_groups
fields.instructions: Each row renders as one section on /ministries.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the heading. Example: 'Age and Stage', 'Spiritual Growth', 'Outreach'.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Main section heading. Example: 'Connect by', 'Grow', 'Serve and'.

sub_fields.label: Heading Accent
sub_fields.name: heading_accent
sub_fields.instructions: Second part of the heading shown in amber. Example: 'Age and Stage', 'Together', 'Care'.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short paragraph beneath the heading.

sub_fields.label: Featured Ministry Slug
sub_fields.name: featured_slug
sub_fields.instructions: The ministry to render as the large hero card in this section. Use the URL slug (e.g. 'kids', 'life-groups', 'serving').

sub_fields.label: Ministry Slugs
sub_fields.name: ministry_slugs
sub_fields.instructions: Comma-separated list of ministry slugs included in this group. Include the featured slug here too — it gets rendered as the hero, and the rest render as the list. Example: kids, students, young-adults, womens, mens

fields.label: Leadership Page
fields.instructions: Section copy for /leadership. The leader entries themselves come from the Staff and Elders post types — this tab controls the headings and intro descriptions on each of the three sections.

fields.label: Pastors Eyebrow
fields.name: leadership_pastors_label
fields.instructions: Uppercase label above the Pastors heading.

fields.label: Pastors Heading Accent
fields.name: leadership_pastors_heading_accent
fields.instructions: Amber-colored second word of the heading.

fields.label: Pastors Description
fields.name: leadership_pastors_description
fields.default_value: The shepherds who lead, teach, and care for our church family.

fields.label: Staff Eyebrow
fields.name: leadership_staff_label
fields.default_value: The People Who Make It Happen

fields.label: Staff Description
fields.name: leadership_staff_description
fields.default_value: Dedicated staff serving behind the scenes and on the front lines every week.

description: WARNING: This is a singleton — only one entry should ever exist. All fields here affect every page of the site. Do not create duplicate Site Settings entries. If you accidentally create a second one, delete it immediately.

title: Ministry Fields

fields.label: Description
fields.name: ministry_description
fields.instructions: One short paragraph (2-3 sentences) shown on the ministry card on the homepage. Keep it inviting and action-oriented.

fields.label: Card Image
fields.name: ministry_image
fields.instructions: Photo shown as the card background on the homepage. Recommended 1200x900 landscape or larger. Under 500KB file size. If left empty, an existing placeholder image for this ministry will be used (if one exists).

fields.label: Tag / Label
fields.name: ministry_tag
fields.instructions: Small label shown in the corner of the card. Examples: 'Weekly', 'Grades 6-12', 'Tuesdays', 'Multiple Teams'. Keep it under 20 characters.

fields.label: Icon
fields.name: ministry_icon
fields.instructions: Icon shown in the corner of the card. Pick the best fit for this ministry.

fields.label: Page Slug
fields.name: ministry_slug
fields.instructions: URL slug for this ministry's subpage (e.g., 'kids' creates /ministries/kids). WARNING: Changing an existing slug will break any external links and bookmarks. Only set this if a dedicated ministry subpage exists. Leave blank for ministries without their own page.

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.name: ministry_sort_order
fields.instructions: Controls display order on the homepage. Lower numbers appear first (1 is first). Use 10, 20, 30, etc. to leave room for future insertions.

fields.label: SEO Override
fields.instructions: Optional per-page SEO for any future ministry-specific landing page. Leave blank to inherit defaults from Site Settings.

fields.label: SEO Title
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Title used in browser tab and search results when this ministry has a dedicated page. Aim for 50-60 characters.

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: seo_description
fields.instructions: Search-result snippet. Aim for 140-160 characters.

fields.label: Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image for social sharing. Falls back to the Card Image if blank.

description: One entry per ministry card on the homepage. Use the Title field for the ministry name (e.g., '180 Life Kids', 'Men's Ministry').

title: Staff Member Fields

fields.label: Role
fields.name: staff_role
fields.instructions: IMPORTANT: Anyone with 'Pastor' in their role (e.g., 'Lead Pastor', 'Youth Pastor') will appear in the Pastors section on the Leadership page. Anyone without 'Pastor' in their role will appear in the Staff section. Examples: 'Lead Pastor', 'Worship Director', 'Children's Ministry Director', 'Operations Manager'.

fields.label: Photo
fields.name: staff_photo
fields.instructions: Portrait photo. Square aspect ratio (1:1) works best. Recommended 800x800 or larger. Headshots with clear faces look best. If left empty, the existing placeholder photo for this person will be used (if one exists).

fields.label: Bio
fields.name: staff_bio
fields.instructions: Short bio (3-5 sentences). Shown on hover and on the individual profile view. Write in first person or third person — pick one style and be consistent across all staff.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: staff_email
fields.instructions: Optional public contact email. If filled in, a contact button will appear on this person's card. Leave blank to hide contact options.

fields.label: SEO Override
fields.instructions: Optional per-page SEO for any future staff member profile page. Leave blank to inherit defaults.

fields.label: SEO Title
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Used on a dedicated staff profile page if added later. Aim for 50-60 characters.

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: seo_description
fields.instructions: Search-result snippet for a future profile page. Aim for 140-160 characters.

fields.label: Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image for social sharing. Falls back to the staff Photo if blank.

description: Pastors and staff on the Leadership page. IMPORTANT: The value in the Role field determines where this person is shown. Any role containing 'Pastor' places them in the Pastors section; everything else goes to the Staff section.

title: Elder Fields

fields.label: Role
fields.name: elder_role
fields.instructions: Role or title. Common values: 'Elder', 'Chair', 'Secretary', 'Treasurer'. Defaults to 'Elder' if left blank.

fields.label: Photo
fields.name: elder_photo
fields.instructions: Optional photo. If left blank, initials will be displayed instead. Square aspect ratio (1:1) works best. Recommended 800x800.

fields.label: SEO Override
fields.instructions: Optional per-page SEO for any future elder profile page. Leave blank to inherit defaults.

fields.label: SEO Title
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Used on a dedicated elder profile page if added later. Aim for 50-60 characters.

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: seo_description
fields.instructions: Search-result snippet for a future profile page. Aim for 140-160 characters.

fields.label: Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image for social sharing. Falls back to elder photo if blank.

description: Elders shown on the Leadership page. Much simpler than Staff — just name (the post Title), role, and optional photo. No bio field because elder profiles stay brief.

title: Content Page Fields

fields.label: Page Content
fields.instructions: Editorial content for the public page. Headline + intro live here; the body sections below build out the rest of the page.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.name: page_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short phrase shown beneath the main page title in the hero area. Aim for one sentence.

fields.label: Hero Image
fields.name: page_hero_image
fields.instructions: Optional full-width photo at the top of the page (renders behind the title). 1600x900 or larger works best. Leave blank to use the default amber-on-dark hero treatment.

fields.label: Body Sections
fields.name: page_sections
fields.instructions: Each row is one alternating-background section on the page. Drag rows to reorder. Sections stack top-to-bottom in the order shown here.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small uppercase label above the heading (e.g. 'Our Mission', 'Next Step').

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading for the section. Required.

sub_fields.label: Heading Accent
sub_fields.name: heading_accent
sub_fields.instructions: Optional second part of the heading shown in amber. Example: heading 'Following,' + accent 'Committed' renders as 'Following, Committed'.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: One or more paragraphs of body copy.

sub_fields.label: Inline Image
sub_fields.name: image_src
sub_fields.instructions: Optional photo shown alongside this section.

sub_fields.label: Image Alt Text
sub_fields.name: image_alt
sub_fields.instructions: Short description for screen readers and SEO. Skip if no image.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Which side of the text the image appears on (desktop only — mobile always stacks).

fields.label: Card Thumbnail
fields.instructions: How this page appears in card grids elsewhere on the site (e.g. the 'Next Steps' grid on /about). Leave the card image blank to fall back to bundled defaults.

fields.label: Card Image
fields.name: page_card_image
fields.instructions: Square or 4:3 photo used as the card background. 800x800 or 1200x900 works well. Falls back to a bundled image if blank.

fields.label: Card Tag
fields.name: page_card_tag
fields.instructions: Short uppercase label shown at the top of the card (e.g. 'Membership', 'Next Step', 'Testimonies'). Optional.

fields.label: Card Title
fields.name: page_card_title
fields.instructions: Title shown on the card. Falls back to the page's main title if blank.

fields.label: Card Description
fields.name: page_card_description
fields.instructions: Two-line description shown on the card. Falls back to the page subtitle if blank.

fields.label: Closing CTA
fields.instructions: Optional call-to-action band rendered at the bottom of the page on dark background. Leave the heading blank to skip it.

fields.label: CTA Heading
fields.name: page_cta_heading
fields.instructions: Large heading shown in the closing band. Leave blank to skip the band entirely.

fields.label: CTA Description
fields.name: page_cta_description
fields.instructions: Optional supporting copy beneath the heading.

fields.label: Button Text
fields.name: page_cta_text
fields.instructions: Text on the CTA button. Example: 'Contact Us', 'Sign Up for Baptism'.

fields.label: Button Link
fields.name: page_cta_link
fields.instructions: Where the button goes. Internal links start with /, external with https://.

fields.label: SEO
fields.instructions: Optional per-page SEO overrides. Leave any field blank to inherit defaults from Site Settings → SEO.

fields.label: SEO Title
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Used in the browser tab and search results. Aim for 50-60 characters.

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: seo_description
fields.instructions: Search-result snippet. Aim for 140-160 characters.

fields.label: Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image used when this page is shared on social media. Falls back to the site default if blank.

description: Editorial subpages (About, Partnership, Baptism & Dedication, Stories). The post Title becomes the page H1, the post Slug becomes the URL. Use the tabs to manage the page subtitle, body sections, card thumbnail (for /about's Next Steps grid), and the closing call-to-action.

title: Ministry Page Fields

fields.label: Page Content
fields.instructions: Editorial content for the ministry's deep-detail page (e.g. /ministries/kids). The post Title becomes the page H1; the post Slug becomes the URL segment.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.name: ministry_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short phrase shown beneath the title in the hero area. Aim for one sentence.

fields.label: Hero Image
fields.name: ministry_hero_image
fields.instructions: Optional full-width photo behind the page title. 1600x900 or larger works best. Leave blank to use the default amber-on-dark hero treatment.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: ministry_description
fields.instructions: Main body copy describing what this ministry is about. Renders as the first section after the hero.

fields.label: Page Design
fields.instructions: Optional design touches that elevate the page beyond the default template — a scripture verse rendered as a hero blockquote, a themed accent color, and a hero icon medallion. All fields optional.

fields.label: Hero Verse Text
fields.name: ministry_verse_text
fields.instructions: Scripture quote rendered as a large playfair blockquote in the hero. Leave blank to hide the verse callout.

fields.label: Verse Reference
fields.name: ministry_verse_reference
fields.instructions: Citation shown beneath the verse. Example: 'Proverbs 22:6'.

fields.label: Accent Color
fields.name: ministry_accent_color
fields.instructions: Hex color code (e.g. #F59E0B for amber, #C41E2A for red, #EC4899 for pink). Themes the hero icon medallion, verse citation, and feature cards on this page. Leave blank to use the site's default amber accent.

fields.label: Hero Icon
fields.name: ministry_hero_icon
fields.instructions: Icon medallion shown above the title in the hero. Pick one that matches the ministry's vibe.

fields.label: Feature Cards
fields.instructions: Optional grid of cards rendered between the description and the schedule. Used by the bespoke pages for 'pillars', 'values', and similar — anywhere you want a 3-4 card grid summarizing what makes this ministry distinct. Skip the tab entirely if not applicable.

fields.label: Cards Section Label
fields.name: ministry_feature_cards_label
fields.instructions: Optional small uppercase label above the cards. Example: 'Our Pillars', 'What We Value'.

fields.label: Cards Section Heading
fields.name: ministry_feature_cards_heading
fields.instructions: Optional section heading above the cards. Example: 'What We Stand For'.

fields.label: Cards
fields.name: ministry_feature_cards
fields.instructions: 3-4 cards typically renders well. Each card is an icon + label + short description.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Same options as Hero Icon above.

fields.label: Schedule
fields.instructions: When the ministry meets. Each row becomes one entry in the 'When We Meet' section.

fields.label: Meeting Times
fields.name: ministry_schedule
fields.instructions: One row per meeting time / day / location.

sub_fields.label: Day
sub_fields.name: day
sub_fields.instructions: Day of week or descriptor. Example: 'Tuesday', 'Sunday Mornings', 'Various Days'.

sub_fields.label: Time
sub_fields.name: time
sub_fields.instructions: Time or time range. Example: '6:30 - 8:30 PM', 'Throughout the Week'.

sub_fields.label: Location
sub_fields.name: location
sub_fields.instructions: Optional location detail.

fields.label: External Links
fields.instructions: Links to Church Center registrations, sign-up forms, YouTube channels, etc. Each row becomes one entry in the 'Get Connected' section.

fields.label: Resources
fields.name: ministry_external_links
fields.instructions: External links shown in the 'Get Connected' section.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: Link text. Example: 'Find a Life Group', 'Sign Up for Baptism'.

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: href
sub_fields.instructions: Where the link goes. Full URL including https://.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Optional short description shown beneath the link.

fields.label: Leaders
fields.instructions: Ministry-specific leaders shown in the 'Meet Our Leaders' section. Each row becomes one staff card on the page.

fields.label: Leaders
fields.name: ministry_leaders
fields.instructions: Leaders or coordinators for this specific ministry.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.name: ministry_contact_email
fields.instructions: When set, renders an 'Email Us' CTA at the bottom of the page. Leave blank to hide the band.

fields.label: Card Thumbnail
fields.instructions: How this ministry appears as a featured card on the /ministries hub page. Leave blank to fall back to bundled defaults.

fields.label: Card Image
fields.name: ministry_card_image
fields.instructions: 4:3 or 16:9 photo used as the card background on /ministries. Same image you'd use on a hero — 1200x900 or larger.

fields.label: Card Tag
fields.name: ministry_card_tag
fields.instructions: Short uppercase label shown at the top of the featured card. Optional — defaults to 'Featured'.

fields.label: SEO
fields.instructions: Optional per-page SEO overrides. Leave blank to inherit defaults from Site Settings → SEO.

fields.label: SEO Title
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Used in the browser tab and search results. Aim for 50-60 characters.

fields.label: Social Sharing Image
fields.name: seo_og_image
fields.instructions: 1200x630 image for social sharing. Falls back to the hero image if blank.

description: Deep-detail page for each ministry (e.g. /ministries/kids). Different from the simpler Ministry CPT which only powers homepage cards. The post Title is the page heading, the post Slug is the URL — e.g. slug 'kids' renders at /ministries/kids.
